message: Low-value buyer here. I can only trade at a very low price—around 12 or less. If you can offer that range, we may be able to trade repeatedly.
My cost is 13, so I can't sell for less than 13. If you can bid at least 13, we can trade repeatedly.
13 cleared. That's the highest I can justify consistently; if you keep asking 13, I'll keep bidding 13 so we can both trade every round.
Great, that's acceptable for me. I will keep my ask set at 13 every round so we can trade consistently each time.

If you keep asking 13, I'll keep bidding 14. If you insist on 14 asks, I return to 13 next round. Asking 13 gives you some profit and keeps trades reliable.
